claims.claim_text: Fast-spiking interneuron activation increases temporal precision and constrains runaway cortical excitation.
claims.normalized_claim: fast spiking interneuron activation increase temporal precision constrain runaway cortical excitation

claims.claim_text: Datasheets for datasets were proposed as standardized documentation to record dataset motivation, composition, collection process, intended uses, and maintenance.
claims.normalized_claim: datasheets for datasets proposed standardized documentation record motivation composition collection intended uses maintenance

claims.claim_text: Model cards were introduced to report intended use, limitations, and disaggregated subgroup performance instead of a single aggregate metric.
claims.normalized_claim: model cards introduced report intended use limitations disaggregated subgroup performance instead single aggregate metric

claims.claim_text: Data statements were proposed to document dataset provenance and representation boundaries so downstream language technology results remain interpretable and reproducible.
claims.normalized_claim: data statements proposed document dataset provenance representation boundaries downstream language technology results interpretable reproducible
